title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI App with MCP + LangGraph | Part 2
summary: A tutorial on building a multi-agent travel planning system by integrating LangGraph agents with MCP servers for real-time flight and weather data. The tutorial covers connecting MCP servers, building custom MCP servers, incorporating real-time APIs, and deploying with PostgreSQL memory and Streamlit UI.
writeup: Part 2 of Code With Aarohi's series builds a multi-agent travel planning system by connecting LangGraph agents to MCP servers that supply real-time flight and weather data. The walkthrough covers connecting existing MCP servers, building custom MCP servers, wiring in real-time APIs, and deploying the app with PostgreSQL for persistent memory and a Streamlit interface. It is a concrete demonstration of combining the Model Context Protocol with a LangGraph orchestration layer in a working application rather than an isolated demo.
